summary: Quick Stock page (/inventory/quick) fully tested and all features working correctly. Split-layout UI with product list on left, detail+movements on right. No modals, single screen - iPOS UX aligned.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Keyboard navigation properly implemented (ArrowUp/Down, Enter, Escape)
Auto-selection on navigation works correctly via useEffect hook
Status calculation (Aman/Kritis/Habis) properly handles min_stock parameter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Stock feature is complete and working. Page at /inventory/quick shows simplified inventory view with search, keyboard navigation, and movement history.

feature_verification.Search filters product list in real-time: PASS - 'Telkomsel' search reduced from 20 to 4 products
feature_verification.Right panel shows product name, code, st: PASS - Shows MXC50K, TOPUP SALDO MAXIM, 1,500, Aman
feature_verification.Movement history table shows date, type: PASS - Columns: Tanggal, Tipe, Masuk, Keluar, Referensi
feature_verification.Sidebar shows Quick Stock link under Inv: PASS - Green highlight + NEW badge visible
